response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep open-source involvement, Linux experience, and broad full-stack expertise, but falls short on two critical requirements: German proficiency is listed as basic while the role mandates minimum C1, and there is no demonstrated experience leading or managing development teams at the operational/executive level this Head of Development role requires. Founder and mentoring activities show initiative but do not substitute for a proven track record in technical project management and team leadership.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions and founder of an open-source geo-data platform, aligning with the company's OSS and digital sovereignty focus
Broad, deep technical range across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance systems with strong Linux and DevOps background
Strong knowledge-sharing record through workshops, courses, and conference talks, suggesting mentoring aptitude
concerns: German language skill is basic, far below the required C1 minimum
No formal team leadership, architecture governance, or technical project management roles despite senior/staff titles
Little evidence of client-facing advisory work, requirements management, UML modeling, or security/compliance experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of proven leadership/management track record
